claims.summary: The semantic lane was widened to 48 dimensions to relieve codec compression pressure.
claims.disposition: verify the current 48D layout, deterministic projection, and exact compatibility fixtures

claims.summary: The feature clamp can create felt crowding and needs visible provenance rather than silent clipping.
claims.disposition: verify per-feature clamp provenance, counts, maxima, and source distinctions already projected by the codec

claims.summary: Projection health and tail lift should be tested for dead dimensions and continuous behavior.
claims.disposition: verify raw and normalized basis health plus smoothstep, no-pop, and repeatability regressions

claims.summary: Reserved dimensions, dynamic widening, or pressure-scaled vibrancy could create more expressive room.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live vector shape or semantic gain
